methods.method_name: RAW 264.7 Cell Culture and NO Production Measurement
methods.description: This method describes the process of culturing RAW 264.7 cells and measuring nitric oxide (NO) production to assess the effects of test samples on cell viability and NO production.

steps.description: RAW 264.7 cells obtained from the American Type Culture Collection were cultured with DMEM supplemented with 10% FBS and 1% antibiotics under 5% CO2 at 37°C and activated with LPS according to the previously described procedures.
steps.searchable_summary: Culture RAW 264.7 cells with DMEM, FBS, antibiotics, and activate with LPS

steps.description: The cells were plated in 96-well plates (2 × 10^5 cells/well). After preincubation for 2 h, the test samples including EtOH BP or Water BP and LPS (1 μg/ml) were added and the cells were incubated for 24 h.
steps.searchable_summary: Plate cells in 96-well plates, add test samples and LPS, incubate for 24 hours

steps.description: Test samples were dissolved in DMSO on the day of the experiment and diluted with serum-free DMEM into appropriate concentrations. Final concentration of DMSO was adjusted to 0.1% (v/v). Control groups also received the same amount of DMSO.
steps.searchable_summary: Dissolve test samples in DMSO, dilute with serum-free DMEM, adjust DMSO concentration

steps.description: Cell viability was assessed with MTT assay.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform MTT assay to assess cell viability

steps.description: For a determination of NO concentration, the amount of nitrite in the cell culture supernatant measured by using Griess reagents.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure nitrite concentration using Griess reagents

steps.description: The cell culture medium was mixed with Griess reagent and incubated for 10 min at room temperature.
steps.searchable_summary: Mix cell culture medium with Griess reagent, incubate for 10 minutes

steps.description: The optical density was measured with a microplate reader at 550 nm.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure optical density at 550 nm using microplate reader

steps.description: Nitrite was quantified by using sodium nitrate as a standard.
steps.searchable_summary: Quantify nitrite using sodium nitrate standard

steps.description: Values for 50% inhibitory concentration (IC50) were obtained by linear regression analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform linear regression analysis to obtain IC50 values
